title: desmodium schindleri
intro: Desmodium schindleri, also known as Schindler's tick trefoil, is a species of plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Desmodium schindleri include reducing fever, treating malaria, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Desmodium schindleri can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
